description: Eval-first computer vision delivery skills for Codex: scope the task, measure proof, and decide CV economics.

defaultPrompt: Count objects in my sample images with an eval gate.
Route this CV request to the right workflow.
Estimate annotation, training, and deployment economics.
interface.longDescription: Scope a computer-vision task, route it to the right skill, define the eval gate before model search, measure a baseline before training, and produce CV economics with an audit trail.
interface.shortDescription: Turn messy CV requests into measured Roboflow proof.

name: vision-delivery
